name: runforge
description: RunForge: Node/TypeScript backend + React web console for general-purpose AI agent runs

scripts.dev: pnpm --filter @runforge/contracts build && concurrently -n contracts,server,web -c yellow,blue,green "pnpm --filter @runforge/contracts dev" "pnpm --filter server dev" "pnpm --filter web dev"
scripts.build: pnpm --filter @runforge/contracts build && pnpm --filter server build && pnpm --filter web build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @runforge/contracts typecheck && pnpm --filter server typecheck && pnpm --filter web typecheck
